description: Master seed data for dynamic competitive exam plan generation. This file does not contain fixed daily plans; it contains exams, subjects, chapters, templates and rules.

sources.name: BPSSC official syllabus
used_for: Bihar Police SI exam structure and syllabus categories

sources.name: UPPRPB official syllabus/notice portal
used_for: UP Police official syllabus access and paper subject categories

sources.name: SSC Constable GD official notice
used_for: SSC GD exam stages and CBE subject categories

quote_bank.text: Roj thoda padho, lekin roj padho.
Weak maths ka solution sirf daily practice hai.
Video dekhna padhai nahi; questions solve karna padhai hai.
Running me consistency selection ka silent factor hai.
Ek teacher, ek book, daily revision — यही base है.
Mock score se darna nahi, usse direction milti hai.
General category me safe score ke liye basics + speed dono chahiye.
Galat questions tumhare personal teachers hain.

notes.pyq_policy: AI-generated questions must use source='ai_generated' and is_verified=false. Verified paper questions should use source='verified_pyq' and is_verified=true.
